If it is not listed, wait for a future rotation and recheck the page.

1270673.overview: Vivacious Chloroceros is an achievement reward, so there is no boss, mob, or vendor to farm directly. Your job is to complete the required achievement criteria tied to this mount, which can vary by patch and may change if Blizzard updates the achievement. Check the linked page for the current criteria and any notes before you start.
checklist: Open the Achievements tab and search for Vivacious Chloroceros to read its criteria and reward.
Track the listed objectives in the relevant zone or activity and complete each requirement on your character.
Use the Achievement UI to monitor progress, especially any account-wide or character-specific criteria.
When the achievement completes, open the reward pane and learn the Vivacious Chloroceros mount.

1270675.overview: Vivid Chloroceros is a vendor mount, so there is no farm or drop chance involved. The only real work is finding the correct vendor and meeting any purchase requirements, which can vary by zone or event. Check the linked page for the current vendor details and any patch-specific notes before you travel.
checklist: Open Collections → Mounts, select Vivid Chloroceros, and read the Source line for the vendor name and zone
Check the vendor’s purchase requirement in-game: currency, reputation, or event availability
Travel to the listed zone, set a map pin on the vendor NPC, and buy Vivid Chloroceros
If the vendor is on a rotation, return when the NPC is present and the item is in stock

1271549.overview: Fel Spirehawk was tied to limited-time Blizzard Shop or event promotions, not a dungeon, vendor grind, or world drop. In Retail it is treated as unobtainable for new players after those offers ended, so there is no farm route to chase.
checklist: Open Collections → Mounts and select Fel Spirehawk to read its source and history.
Confirm on Wowhead or official notes whether any current promotion still grants it (typically it does not).
If you claimed it during the original window, it stays in your collection; otherwise there is no current Retail acquisition path.
Track it only for completion context, not as an active farm target.

1289395.overview: Swift Spectral Dragonhawk is an achievement reward, so there is no boss to farm and no weekly lockout to worry about. The exact criteria can change with updates or event rules, so verify the current requirements on the linked page before you start. Once you complete the achievement, the mount is awarded automatically.

Track the achievement, then complete each listed criterion on the same character or account as required.
